pkgmetadata.longdescription:
vLLM is a fast and easy-to-use library for LLM inference and serving. Provides a Python API and an OpenAI-compatible HTTP server.
USE=cpu flips the build to VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=cpu and pulls torchaudio + numba so inference runs on CPU. Default (USE=-cpu) builds with VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=empty — Python entrypoints import cleanly, backend kernels fail at first model load (useful if you only want the API surface for development).
USE flags for cuda/rocm targets are planned in subsequent cycles once the missing deps (flashinfer/tilelang for cuda; amd-quark py 3.13/3.14 for rocm) are sorted.

use.flag: Build for CPU inference (VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=cpu); pull torchaudio + numba
